focus: Arena Field Edition M2 step 4: the optional §8 `hermes` verify gate — the LAST unwired first-boot gate — is now wired LIVE + PASSING. LiveGateRunner.hermes (was an honest-error stub) drives the fieldkit-as-MCP server (the surface a Hermes harness drives) with a real MCP client over stdio: initialize → list_tools → call_tool(spark_inference_envelope), confirming one read-only tool round-trip returns. Live-smoked through the real CLI: `fieldkit field-edition verify --hermes` → hermes status: pass (15 fieldkit tools exposed) in <1s. Design: the probe is a capabilities lookup (no GPU/model/disk/net), so it's lane-safe (honors the one-lane invariant — resident Advisor lane untouched) and PASSES stack-independently like the Cortex recall-half; the brain-driven full Hermes agent run stays the heavier hermes-harness §H4 milestone, not a first-boot gate. With this the ENTIRE §8 battery (fieldkit/advisor/cortex/lane/hermes) is wired LIVE — no honest-error stubs remain. Honest error (never a vanity pass) when the fieldkit[harness] mcp extra is missing or the transport fails. 5 new tests (141 field_edition); full collectable suite 1720 passed/0 failed. fieldkit-internal → lands in [Unreleased]; no version bump, no website rebuild. Separately still 🟢: Arena Field Edition LIVE on both sides — founding-25 sellable (fieldkit v0.32.2 embedded prod license pubkey, getarena.orionfold.com installer live).
next: §9 hosted signed-matrix feed so LiveUpdateChannel.fetch_latest can pull a NEW signed proven matrix (last M3 piece — images are signed + cosign-verifiable now; only the feed is missing; lives in the Website peer's entitlement-fetch) — no Spark dependency
